Information 
^ = Blank
508 THGHT_BETTER_DD_ADMSN_CD THGHT_BETTER_DD_ADMSN_CD Mood: Thoughts of better off dead: P (A) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient said they had thoughts that they would be better off dead, or of hurting themselves in some way. 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
9 = No response 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
509 THGHT_BETTER_DD_DSCHRG_CD THGHT_BETTER_DD_DSCHRG_CD Mood: Thoughts of better off dead: P (D) CHAR 1 This column documents
